excerpt: the seed of enslaved peoples, tillers of the soil, and the peoples of the southern lands
source_location_hint: discussion of Saturn's generation of base minerals and human types

excerpt: The seed of the pious, regardless of faith, was gathered here: the righteous, the believers in God, the modest ones, those who fear the Divine (the chaste), and prophets of such virtue
source_location_hint: Jupiter's generation of virtuous human types

excerpt: All crawling creatures (those that burrow in the belly of the earth), snakes, scorpions, rats, lizards, and locusts were born in his dominion. Likewise all savage beasts—lions, leopards—came forth in his time
source_location_hint: Mars's generation of predatory animals and insects

excerpt: Gathered here were the seeds of kings, nobles, and rulers
source_location_hint: discussion of the Sun's generation of royal types

excerpt: The seed of the Arabs and women assembled here. Likewise the seed of all musicians, artisans, and craftspeople was produced
source_location_hint: Venus's role in generating refined human types and the feminine principle

excerpt: The heart supported the three organs above it and the three below, just as the Sun supports the three spheres above it and the three below
source_location_hint: correspondence between human microcosm and celestial macrocosm, with heart as central locus

excerpt: Through its warmth, it transforms it into clot-form and then into lump-form. The heat of this sphere increases the power of growth and opens pathways in the form of pores for nutrition. In this month, the essential vital parts begin to appear
source_location_hint: Mars's role in the third month of gestation, transformation of clot to lump, opening of nutrient pathways

excerpt: In the fourth month, the heart moves—that is, three chambers form in the heart and it commences its beating. When the eighth month begins, Saturn exerts its effect again; Saturn renders the child dead, so the child born in the eighth month is born dead. But the ninth month is Jupiter's, and the infant is born healthy
source_location_hint: seven-stage foetal development, cardiac motion in fourth month, Saturn's eighth-month danger, Jupiter's ninth-month salvation

excerpt: For this reason, the Almighty is described as 'Creator of the Heavens, Dweller upon the Earth, Stillness of Minerals, Growth of Plants, and Life-Giver to Animals'
source_authority: Ismaili philosophy of emanation and correspondence
source_location_hint: Universal Soul's differentiated manifestation across realms of being, macrocosm-microcosm analogy
